biome.minecraft.badlands.description: 暑く乾燥したバイオーム
biome.minecraft.bamboo_jungle.descriptio: A rare Jungle biome variant with dense bamboos.
biome.minecraft.basalt_deltas.descriptio: A hot biome, composed of basalt and blackstone. It's full of ashes passing by.
biome.minecraft.beach.description: A hot biome that generates on the coast.
biome.minecraft.cherry_grove.description: A beautiful temperate grass land biome with a cherry tree forest.
biome.minecraft.cold_ocean.description: 海草、ケルプ、タラ、サーモンが生息する冷たい海のバイオーム
biome.minecraft.crimson_forest.descripti: A hot and dense biome with a red fog and blazing particles are seen floating.
biome.minecraft.dark_forest.description: A temperate biome covered in a dense forest such that at ground level it is often dark enough to Monsters to spawn.
biome.minecraft.deep_cold_ocean.descript: Similar to the cold ocean biome, but twice as deep. Where ocean monuments can be found.
biome.minecraft.deep_dark.description: A dimly lit cave biome that generates deep underground. Is covered in Sculk and where Ancient Cities are found.
biome.minecraft.deep_frozen_ocean.descri: Like the frozen ocean biome, the only fishes that spawn here are Salmon and Cod, and the floor consists of gravel.
biome.minecraft.deep_lukewarm_ocean.desc: Similar to the lukewarm ocean biome, but twice as deep. Where ocean monuments can be found.
biome.minecraft.deep_ocean.description: A variant of the ocean biome. With the ground mainly covered of gravel.
biome.minecraft.desert.description: A hot biome with no rainfall with little vegetation other than Cacti. Desert Villages can be found here as can Pyramids and Wells but no Livestock will spawn.
biome.minecraft.dripstone_caves.descript: A cave full of pointed dripstone and small water wells in the ground. Drowned can spawn here.
biome.minecraft.end_barrens.description: A part of the outer islands of the End. The outer rims of each island, with steep cliffs below the edge.
biome.minecraft.end_highlands.descriptio: The hilltops of each outer end island. The only biome in the End where both chorus trees and end cities generate.
biome.minecraft.end_midlands.description: A slope from the hilltops of each outer end island down to the cliffs around the edge.
biome.minecraft.eroded_badlands.descript: A rare variant of the Badlands. Tall and narrow spires of colorful terracotta rise out of the floor of the canyon.
biome.minecraft.flower_forest.descriptio: A florest variant that has fewer trees. Nearly every type of flower and tall plant can be found here.
biome.minecraft.forest.description: 森林地帯。花ときのこが豊富にある。通常の家畜のほか、オオカミが出現することもある
biome.minecraft.frozen_ocean.description: 最高に冷たい海のバイオーム。雪が降り、水面が凍る。イカとタラは出現するが、イルカは出現しない
biome.minecraft.frozen_peaks.description: A biome covered by snow blocks and packed ice with occasional small blobs of ice. Only goats can spawn in this biome.
biome.minecraft.frozen_river.description: A river with a layer of ice covering its surface. Salmon spawn underwater while rabbits and polar bears spawn on ice.
biome.minecraft.grove.description: A forest of spruce trees beneath the mountain peaks. Its surface is covered with snow layers, snow blocks, dirt and a lot of powder snow. Rabbits, wolves and foxes can spawn in this biome.
biome.minecraft.ice_spikes.description: A rare variant of the snowy plains biome. Contains large spikes and glaciers of packed ice.
biome.minecraft.jagged_peaks.description: A really tall mountain biome. Have really jagged and pointy peaks that often pass the clouds.
biome.minecraft.jungle.description: 巨木と下草がうっそうと茂った、温暖なバイオーム。ヤマネコが出現し、スイカとカカオの実が見つかる。ジャングルの神殿も出現することがある
biome.minecraft.lukewarm_ocean.descripti: A lukewarm Ocean biome that can contain Seagrass, Kelp and Cod.
biome.minecraft.lush_caves.description: A cave biome found below azalea trees. Is covered by moss blocks, moss carpets, short grass and azalea bushes on the floors.
biome.minecraft.mangrove_swamp.descripti: A biome with a really a dense foliage. Contains plenty of mangrove trees. The floor is mainly composed of mud blocks.
biome.minecraft.meadow.description: An elevated grassy biome found in plateaus near mountain ranges. It is filled with flowers and a lone oak or birch tree can generate and always has a bee nest.
biome.minecraft.mushroom_fields.descript: An eccentric biome populated with Giant Mushrooms and Mushrooms where mushrooms can grow in sunlight. Little else can be found here and it's rare to find other creatures.
biome.minecraft.nether_wastes.descriptio: A hot biome with no rain and an ominous red fog. Ghasts, Zombified Piglin and Magma Cubes will spawn here.
biome.minecraft.ocean.description: A temperate Ocean biome that can contain Seagrass, Kelp and Cod.
An uncommon variant of the birch forest. Birch trees grow much taller here.
biome.minecraft.old_growth_pine_taiga.de: A biome composed of spruce trees. Mossy cobblestone boulders appear frequently, mushrooms are common, and podzol can be found on the forest floor.
A biome of really big spruce trees. Mossy cobblestone boulders and mushrooms can be found here. The floor is covered in podzol.
biome.minecraft.plains.description: 樹木がほとんどない草地。家畜と馬が出現し、村が生成されることもある
biome.minecraft.river.description: A biome that consists of water blocks that form an elongated curving shape. Rivers cut through terrain or separate other biomes.
biome.minecraft.savanna.description: 暖かく乾燥したバイオームで降雨はない。村、馬、ラマがスポーンする
biome.minecraft.savanna_plateau.descript: A savanna biome that spawns at high altitudes and near mountains.
biome.minecraft.small_end_islands.descri: Part of the outer islands of the End.
biome.minecraft.snowy_beach.description: A beach biome covered in snow. Found when a snowy biome borders a frozen ocean biome.
biome.minecraft.snowy_plains.description: 氷に覆われたバイオームで、植物はほとんどない。雪が降ると、湖が凍ってしまう。ここにも村が存在する
biome.minecraft.snowy_slopes.description: A biome found beneath the mountain peaks. Covered in multiple layers of snow blocks and powder snow, with some sides also having stone cliffs.
biome.minecraft.snowy_taiga.description: 雪に覆われたタイガバイオーム。シダやマツが群生している。オオカミが自然に出現する。
biome.minecraft.soul_sand_valley.descrip: A large biome that is extensive and cuts through the Nether's usual terrain. Covered in soul sand and soul soil, and contains basalt pillars.
biome.minecraft.sparse_jungle.descriptio: A sparser variation of the Jungle biome.
biome.minecraft.stony_peaks.description: A warmer variant of peak biomes, found in warmer regions. Covered by stone with large strips of calcite and exposed ores.
biome.minecraft.stony_shore.description: A stone-covered biome often appears where mountains meet the ocean.
biome.minecraft.sunflower_plains.descrip: A uncommon variant of the plains. The only place where sunflowers can be naturally found.
biome.minecraft.swamp.description: A dank, wet biome of variable temperature. Witch Huts and Giant Mushrooms can be found here and Slimes will spawn on the surface.
biome.minecraft.taiga.description: A coniferous woodland biome. Villages can be found here, and Wolves may spawn in addition to the usual Livestock.
biome.minecraft.the_end.description: A cold desolate biome. Endermen will spawn frequently and the Ender Dragon can be found at the center of the world.
biome.minecraft.the_void.description: An empty and cold desolate biome below bedrock.
biome.minecraft.warm_ocean.description: A warmer Ocean biome that can contain Coral reefs, Cod, and Sea Pickles, but not Kelp.
biome.minecraft.warped_forest.descriptio: A hot and dense biome with no rain and has a cyan fog and particles with a dark royal blue tone are seen floating. Endermen will spawn frequently.
biome.minecraft.windswept_forest.descrip: A windswept hills biome located next to woodland biomes. There are more spruce and oak trees in this biome.
biome.minecraft.windswept_gravelly_hills: A biome mostly covered in gravel with occasional patches of grass and stone blocks.
biome.minecraft.windswept_hills.descript: A highland biome with some steep hilltops. Snowfall occurs up in the mountain, contains snow layers on the top of the hills.
biome.minecraft.windswept_savanna.descri: An uncommon Savanna variant. Has a chaotic terrain with gigantic mountains covered in coarse dirt and patch of stone.
biome.minecraft.wooded_badlands.descript: A Badlands variant. Layers of coarse dirt and forests of oak trees are found there.

block.minecraft.acacia_pressure_plate.ti: 感度が高いアカシアの板で、どんな圧力でも作動する
block.minecraft.activator_rail.tip: ホッパー付きのトロッコを有効/無効にしたり、TNT付きのトロッコを起爆させることができるレール
block.minecraft.allium.tip: 希少な赤紫色の花で赤紫色の染料をクラフトできる
block.minecraft.amethyst_block.tip: Generated as part of Amethyst Geodes. Can be used as decoration.
block.minecraft.amethyst_cluster.tip: Can be mined for Amethyst Shards or used as decoration.
block.minecraft.ancient_debris.tip: ネザーの奥深くで見つかる珍しい鉱石。ネザライトの欠片に精錬できる。溶岩や炎で燃えない
block.minecraft.andesite.tip: 安山岩はツルハシで採取できる
block.minecraft.anvil.tip: 武器、道具、防具を修理するのに使われる
block.minecraft.azalea.tip: Found in Lush Caves and drops from Azalea Leaves. Can be grown to an Azalea tree.
block.minecraft.azure_bluet.tip: A small white flower that can be used to craft light gray dye.
block.minecraft.bamboo.tip: Pandas love to eat Bamboo, and you can use it to build Scaffolding.
block.minecraft.bamboo_block.tip: 斧を使って切る。木の板の材料になったり、燃料としても使われる
block.minecraft.bamboo_mosaic.tip: Crafted from Bamboo Slabs. Can be used as decoration.
block.minecraft.bamboo_pressure_plate.ti: 感度が高い竹の板で、どんな圧力でも作動する
block.minecraft.banner.tip: カスタマイズ要素の高い独立した装飾品。染料を様々な模様に合わせて作ることができる
block.minecraft.barrel.tip: 樽はチェストと同じようにアイテムの保管に使えます
block.minecraft.barrier.tip: 不可視だが、固いブロック
block.minecraft.basalt.tip: An igneous rock found in the Nether. Can be used for construction.
block.minecraft.beacon.tip: 空に向かって光を発し、近くにいるプレイヤーにステータス効果を与える
block.minecraft.bed.tip: Used to forward time from any time at night to morning if all the players in the world are in bed, and changes the spawn point of the player. Beds can be crafted in various colors by using dyed wool.
block.minecraft.bedrock.tip: 破壊することができない
block.minecraft.bee_nest.tip: A block that shelters bees and stores their honey. Generates under Oak, Birch, and Mangrove trees.
block.minecraft.beehive.tip: An artificial alternative to the Bee Nest crafted with 3 Honeycombs and 6 Planks.
block.minecraft.bell.tip: 鐘を使って付近の村人に危険を知らせましょう
block.minecraft.big_dripleaf.tip: Generates in Lush Caves. Tilts down when an entity stands on it.
block.minecraft.birch_pressure_plate.tip: 感度が高いシラカバの板で、どんな圧力でも作動する
黒のテラコッタをかまどで焼くことで作成できる装飾用ブロック
block.minecraft.blackstone.tip: Found in the Nether. Can be used to construct a furnace or stone tools.
block.minecraft.blackstone_wall.tip: ブラックストーンでできた塀
block.minecraft.blast_furnace.tip: 溶鉱炉を使うと、かまどよりすばやく鉱石を精錬できます
block.minecraft.blue_glazed_terracotta.t: 青のテラコッタをかまどで焼くことで作成できる装飾用ブロック
block.minecraft.blue_ice.tip: 氷塊ブロック9個で生成する。青い氷はもっと滑る!
block.minecraft.blue_orchid.tip: 希少な青い花で空色の染料をクラフトできる
block.minecraft.bone_block.tip: 骨粉から作る。または地中の化石から取れる。装飾として使われる
block.minecraft.bookshelf.tip: エンチャントテーブルの周囲に並べることで、エンチャントの効果をより強力にできる
block.minecraft.shelf.tip: Similar to an item frame, this will display and hold up to 3 stacks of items. Activating with a redstone signal allows for depositing of multiple items. Can be used as decoration.
block.minecraft.brewing_stand.tip: ポーションやスプラッシュポーションの調合に使う
block.minecraft.bricks.tip: かまどで粘土を焼いて作る
茶色のテラコッタをかまどで焼くことで作成できる装飾用ブロック
block.minecraft.budding_amethyst.tip: Generates Amethyst Clusters over time. Will not drop if mined.
block.minecraft.bush.tip: Similar to grass, but does not drop wheat seeds when broken.
block.minecraft.button.tip: 押すと電気を送れる。約１秒間起動した後、自動的にオフになる
block.minecraft.cactus.tip: かまどで加熱することで、緑色の染料になる
block.minecraft.cactus_flower.tip: A small pink flower found on cacti that can be used to craft pink dye.
block.minecraft.calcite.tip: Generated as part of Amethyst Geodes. Can be used as decoration.
特定の強さの音を感知するとレッドストーン信号を発する。強さはセンサーにレッドストーン信号を与えて決めることができる。羊毛を通すと音を感知できなくなる
block.minecraft.campfire.tip: 焚き火を使うと、食料を調理したり、明かりを提供したり、煙で合図したりすることができます
block.minecraft.candle.tip: Can be placed in a cake or on the floor as decoration.
block.minecraft.carpet.tip: ウールから作る。装飾として使われる
block.minecraft.cartography_table.tip: 製図台を使えば、地図を簡単に生成したり、複製したりすることができます。
block.minecraft.carved_pumpkin.tip: ヘルメットとしてかぶったり、たいまつと組み合わせてカボチャ ランタンにできる。
block.minecraft.cauldron.tip: 染料を混ぜたり防具を染めたり、またはポーションを保管してチップ付きの矢を作るのに使われる。雨水またはバケツの水を入れる
block.minecraft.cave_vines.tip: A glowing plant that grows Glow Berries. Found in Lush Caves.
block.minecraft.chain.tip: Can be hung in a ceiling or wall as decoration or to support a Lantern.
block.minecraft.cherry_pressure_plate.ti: 感度が高いサクラの板で、どんな圧力でも作動する
block.minecraft.chest.tip: 中にブロックやアイテムを保管できる。２つのチェストを横に並べることで、２倍の容量のラージチェストができる
block.minecraft.copper_chest.tip: Stores blocks and items inside. Place two chests side by side to create a larger chest with double the capacity. Can be used with Copper Golems to distribute items to other nearby chests.
block.minecraft.chiseled_bookshelf.tip: Can be used to hold up to six books.
block.minecraft.chiseled_copper.tip: Crafted with Copper Slabs. Found in Trial Chambers.
Crafted with Exposed Copper Slabs. Found in Trial Chambers.
block.minecraft.oxidized_chiseled_copper: Crafted with Oxidized Copper Slabs. Found in Trial Chambers.
block.minecraft.weathered_chiseled_coppe: Crafted with Weathered Copper Slabs. Found in Trial Chambers.
block.minecraft.waxed_chiseled_copper.ti: Crafted with Waxed Copper Slabs. Found in Trial Chambers.
block.minecraft.waxed_exposed_chiseled_c: Crafted with Waxed Exposed Copper Slabs. Found in Trial Chambers.
block.minecraft.waxed_oxidized_chiseled_: Crafted with Waxed Oxidized Copper Slabs. Found in Trial Chambers.
block.minecraft.waxed_weathered_chiseled: Crafted with Waxed Weathered Copper Slabs. Found in Trial Chambers.
block.minecraft.chiseled_deepslate.tip: Made from Cobbled Deepslate Slabs. Found in Ancient Cities, and can be used for construction.
block.minecraft.chiseled_nether_bricks.t: Crafted with Nether Brick Slabs. Can be used for construction.
block.minecraft.chiseled_polished_blacks: Crafted with Polished Blackstone Slabs. Can be used for construction.
block.minecraft.chiseled_resin_bricks.ti: Crafted with Resin Brick Slabs. Can be used for construction.
block.minecraft.chiseled_tuff.tip: Crafted with Tuff Slabs. Found in Trial Chambers, and can be used for construction.
block.minecraft.chiseled_tuff_bricks.tip: Crafted with Tuff Brick Slabs. Found in Trial Chambers, and can be used for construction.
block.minecraft.chorus_flower.tip: エンドストーンに植えることで、コーラスの花とコーラスプラントを栽培できる。
block.minecraft.chorus_plant.tip: コーラスの花から成長する。破壊するとコーラスフルーツをドロップすることがある。
block.minecraft.clay.tip: 壊すと粘土の塊を落とす。粘土はかまどで焼くとレンガになる
block.minecraft.closed_eyeblossom.tip: A rare flower that blossoms at night. Can be crafted into gray dye.
block.minecraft.coal_block.tip: 石炭を省スペースに保管できる。かまどの燃料としてつかう
block.minecraft.coal_ore.tip: ツルハシで掘れる。石炭が採れる
block.minecraft.coarse_dirt.tip: 草が生えない特殊な土
block.minecraft.cobbled_deepslate.tip: Mined from Deepslate using a pickaxe. Can be used to craft a variety of deepslate blocks, as well as stone tools and a furnace.
block.minecraft.cobbled_deepslate_wall.t: A wall made of Cobbled Deepslate.
block.minecraft.cobblestone.tip: ツルハシを使って石から掘り出す。かまどや石の道具を作るのに使う
block.minecraft.cobweb.tip: 歩くと移動が遅くなる。剣で破壊でき、糸が採れる
block.minecraft.cocoa.tip: 栽培して、カカオ豆を収穫できる
block.minecraft.colored_candle.tip: Created by mixing dye with a Candle.
block.minecraft.colored_terracotta.tip: テラコッタを染めてできるカラフルなブロック
block.minecraft.command_block.tip: コマンドを実行するのに使う
block.minecraft.comparator.tip: 信号の強度を維持、比較、減少させるため、または特定のブロックの状態を測定するために、レッドストーンの回路に使われる
block.minecraft.composter.tip: The Composter can be used to recycle various plant and food items to produce Bone Meal.
block.minecraft.concrete.tip: ツルハシで掘るか、コンクリートの粉が水ブロックに触れると生成されます
block.minecraft.concrete_powder.tip: 水ブロックに触れるとコンクリートになります
block.minecraft.conduit.tip: 水中や雨の中にいるときに、近くにいるプレイヤーに強力なパワーを与える
block.minecraft.copper_bars.tip: 柵と同様、障害物として使う
block.minecraft.copper_block.tip: Crafted from Copper. Can be used as decoration and construction.
block.minecraft.copper_bulb.tip: Emits light when powered, and gets dimmer the more it oxidizes.
block.minecraft.copper_chain.tip: Crafted from copper. Used as decoration.
block.minecraft.copper_door.tip: Copper doors are activated by using them or with Redstone.
block.minecraft.copper_golem_statue.tip: A decorative statue obtained when a Copper Golem fully oxidizes. Can be scraped back into a normal Copper Golem.
block.minecraft.copper_grate.tip: Similar to a Copper Block, but can be seen through.
block.minecraft.copper_lantern.tip: ランタンはブロックにぶら下げるか、ブロックの上に置くことができる。松明よりも少し明るくなる
block.minecraft.copper_ore.tip: Can be mined with a stone pickaxe or better to collect raw copper.
block.minecraft.copper_torch.tip: 明かりを照らすのに使う。たいまつは、雪や氷も溶かすことができる
block.minecraft.copper_wall_torch.tip: 明かりを照らすのに使う。たいまつは、雪や氷も溶かすことができる
block.minecraft.coral.tip: 珊瑚礁の装飾用ブロック。水中にしか置けない
block.minecraft.coral_block.tip: 暖かい海にあり、ツルハシで掘ることができる装飾用ブロック。サンゴブロックは水に触れていないと死んでしまう
block.minecraft.coral_fan.tip: 珊瑚礁の装飾用ブロック。ブロックの横に置くことができる
block.minecraft.cornflower.tip: A small blue flower that can be used to craft blue dye.
block.minecraft.cracked_nether_bricks.ti: Created by smelting Nether Bricks in a furnace. Can be used for construction.
block.minecraft.cracked_polished_blackst: Created by smelting Polished Blackstone Bricks in a furnace. Can be used for construction.
block.minecraft.crafter.tip: Crafts items automatically when it receives a Redstone signal.

block.minecraft.red_nether_brick_wall.ti: ネザーレンガでできた塀
block.minecraft.red_nether_bricks.tip: 暗黒茸と暗黒レンガから作る。装飾として使われる
block.minecraft.red_sand.tip: メサに見られる赤い砂。かまどで精錬するとガラスになる。下にブロックがないと重力の影響を受ける
block.minecraft.red_sandstone.tip: 赤い砂岩。通常の砂のように重力の影響を受けない
block.minecraft.red_tulip.tip: 小さな赤い花で赤い染料をクラフトできる
block.minecraft.redstone_block.tip: レッドストーンの動力源として使われる。レッドストーンへと復元することができる
block.minecraft.redstone_lamp.tip: 動力を受けると点灯する
block.minecraft.redstone_ore.tip: 鉄のツルハシ以上で掘れる。レッドストーンダストが採れる
block.minecraft.redstone_torch.tip: ブロックの横に取り付けて、常に電気を送ったり、送受信機として使える。弱い明りとしても使用可能
block.minecraft.reinforced_deepslate.tip: An extremely tough block that generates in Ancient Cities. When destroyed, does not drop itself.
block.minecraft.repeater.tip: 反復装置、遅延装置、ダイオードとして単体で、または組み合わせて、レッドストーンの回路に使われる
block.minecraft.resin_block.tip: A compact way of storing Resin Clumps.
block.minecraft.resin_brick_wall.tip: A wall made of Resin Bricks.
block.minecraft.resin_bricks.tip: Created by smelting a Block of Resin in a furnace. Can be used for construction.
block.minecraft.resin_clump.tip: Dropped by Creaking Hearts and can be found in the area surrounding one when attacking a creaking. Can be crafted into a Block of Resin, which can then be smelted in a Furnace to make Resin Bricks.
block.minecraft.respawn_anchor.tip: グロウストーンでチャージすることで、ネザーで復活地点を変更することができる
block.minecraft.rooted_dirt.tip: A Dirt Block with roots from an Azalea tree. Can be used as decoration.
block.minecraft.rose_bush.tip: 高い赤い花で赤色の染料をクラフトできる
block.minecraft.sand.tip: シャベルを使って集める。かまどに入れて精錬するとガラスになる。下に何もないと重力に引かれる
block.minecraft.sandstone.tip: 建築用素材。通常の砂のように重力の影響を受けない
block.minecraft.sapling.tip: 植えると、最終的に木に成長する
block.minecraft.scaffolding.tip: 足場を使うと大きな建造物を安全に建てられます!足場は中を歩いたり、上に立ったりできます
block.minecraft.sculk.tip: Drops experience orbs when broken. Generates in the Deep Dark or from a Sculk Catalyst.
block.minecraft.sculk_catalyst.tip: Generates sculk around it when a mob dies nearby.
block.minecraft.sculk_sensor.tip: 音を感知するとレッドストーン信号を発する。羊毛を通すと音を感知できなくなる
block.minecraft.sculk_shrieker.tip: Spawns in a Warden when activated four times by a player stepping on it, projectiles or Sculk Sensor signals.
block.minecraft.sculk_vein.tip: Generates in the Deep Dark or from a Sculk Catalyst. Can be used as decoration.
block.minecraft.sea_lantern.tip: 海の要塞に見られる水中の光源。プリズマリンの破片とプリズマリンクリスタルから作れる
block.minecraft.sea_pickle.tip: 水中で発光する小動物。暖かい海にいる
block.minecraft.seagrass.tip: 海底に生息する。ハサミで収穫し、ウミガメの繁殖に使う
block.minecraft.short_dry_grass.tip: Similar to grass, but found in the desert.
block.minecraft.short_grass.tip: 壊すと時々、小麦の種が出てくる
block.minecraft.shroomlight.tip: A light source that can be harvested from huge fungi.
block.minecraft.shulker_box.tip: たとえ壊れてもアイテムを入れておける特別なチェスト。チェストとシュルカーの殻を使って生成できます
block.minecraft.sign.tip: 自分やほかのプレイヤーの入力したテキストを表示できる
block.minecraft.slab.tip: 長い階段を作るのに使う。２つのハーフブロックを重ねて置くと通常サイズのブロックになる
block.minecraft.slime_block.tip: モブやプレイヤーが飛び乗ると跳ね返す
block.minecraft.small_amethyst_bud.tip: Will grow into a Medium Amethyst Bud. Can also be used as decoration.
block.minecraft.small_dripleaf.tip: Generates in Lush Caves. Can be grown into a Big Dripleaf or be used as decoration.
block.minecraft.smithing_table.tip: 鍛冶台は村人の作業場で、村の中に現れます
block.minecraft.smoker.tip: 燻製器を使うと、かまどよりすばやく食料アイテムを調理できます
block.minecraft.smooth_basalt.tip: A smooth form of Basalt that can be acquired by smelting Basalt in a Furnace. Also generates in Amethyst Geodes. Can be used for construction.
block.minecraft.smooth_stone.tip: 滑らかな石のハーフブロックを作るのに使う
block.minecraft.sniffer_egg.tip: Grows into a Sniffer. The process is quicker if the Sniffer Egg is placed on moss.
block.minecraft.snow.tip: シャベルで掘り出して雪玉を作る
block.minecraft.snow_block.tip: 雪玉を保管するのに使える
block.minecraft.soul_campfire.tip: ソウルブロックとクラフトした少し暗い焚き火。ピグリンを避けるのに使える。焚き火の代わりに使える
block.minecraft.soul_fire.tip: A type of fire that deals double the damage of normal fire.
block.minecraft.soul_lantern.tip: ソウルブロックとクラフトできる少し暗いランタン。ピグリンを避けるのに使える。ランタンの代わりに使える
block.minecraft.soul_sand.tip: 上を歩くもののスピードを遅くする
block.minecraft.soul_soil.tip: Found in the Nether. Can be used for construction. Makes you walk faster on it if your boots have the Soul Speed enchantment.
block.minecraft.soul_torch.tip: ソウルブロックとクラフトした少し暗い松明。ピグリンを避けるのに使える。松明の代わりに使える
block.minecraft.spawner.tip: モンスターを出現させる
block.minecraft.sponge.tip: Can absorb water nearby, turning into a wet sponge in the process.
block.minecraft.spore_blossom.tip: Releases cosmetic spores over time. Found in Lush Caves.
block.minecraft.spruce_pressure_plate.ti: 感度が高いトウヒの板で、どんな圧力でも作動する
block.minecraft.stained_glass.tip: ガラスと染料から作られる
block.minecraft.stained_glass_pane.tip: ステンドグラスから作られる
block.minecraft.stairs.tip: 小さな階段を作るのに使う
block.minecraft.sticky_piston.tip: (ボタン、レバー、重量感知板、レッドストーンのたいまつ、またはレッドストーンといずれかの組み合わせによって) 電気が送られると、ピストンが伸びてブロックを押し、ピストンが戻る時には、触れているブロックを引き戻す
block.minecraft.stone.tip: ツルハシで掘れる。丸石が採れる
block.minecraft.stone_bricks.tip: 石ブロックから作る。要塞で見かけることが多い
block.minecraft.stone_pressure_plate.tip: 感圧式の板で、重量のあるモブやプレイヤーが乗ると作動する
block.minecraft.stonecutter.tip: 石切機を使うと石系のアイテムをクラフトできます
block.minecraft.stripped_acacia_log.tip: 斧で樹皮をはいだアカシアの原木
block.minecraft.stripped_acacia_wood.tip: 斧で樹皮をはいだアカシアの木
block.minecraft.stripped_bamboo_block.ti: A Block of Bamboo that has had the bark removed with an axe.
block.minecraft.stripped_birch_log.tip: 斧で樹皮をはいだシラカバの原木
block.minecraft.stripped_birch_wood.tip: 斧で樹皮をはいだシラカバの木
block.minecraft.stripped_cherry_log.tip: A Cherry log that has had the bark removed with an axe.
block.minecraft.stripped_cherry_wood.tip: Cherry wood that has had the bark removed with an axe.
Crimson hyphae that has had the bark removed with an axe.
block.minecraft.stripped_crimson_stem.ti: A Crimson stem that has had the bark removed with an axe.
block.minecraft.stripped_dark_oak_log.ti: 斧で樹皮をはいだダークオークの原木.
block.minecraft.stripped_dark_oak_wood.t: 斧で樹皮をはいだダークオークの木
block.minecraft.stripped_jungle_log.tip: 斧で樹皮をはいだジャングルの原木
block.minecraft.stripped_jungle_wood.tip: 斧で樹皮をはいだジャングルの木
block.minecraft.stripped_mangrove_log.ti: 斧で樹皮をはいだマングローブの原木
block.minecraft.stripped_mangrove_wood.t: 斧で樹皮をはいだマングローブの木
block.minecraft.stripped_oak_log.tip: 斧で樹皮をはいだオークの原木
block.minecraft.stripped_oak_wood.tip: 斧で樹皮をはいだオークの木
block.minecraft.stripped_pale_oak_log.ti: A Pale Oak log that has had the bark removed with an axe.
block.minecraft.stripped_pale_oak_wood.t: Pale Oak wood that has had the bark removed with an axe.
block.minecraft.stripped_spruce_log.tip: 斧で樹皮をはいだトウヒの原木
block.minecraft.stripped_spruce_wood.tip: 斧で樹皮をはいだトウヒの木
block.minecraft.stripped_warped_hyphae.t: Warped hyphae that has had the bark removed with an axe.
block.minecraft.stripped_warped_stem.tip: A Warped stem that has had the bark removed with an axe.
block.minecraft.structure_block.tip: Used to save and load structures.
block.minecraft.structure_void.tip: Used to ignore blocks when saving structures in Structure Blocks.
block.minecraft.sugar_cane.tip: 砂糖を作るための材料になる
block.minecraft.sunflower.tip: 高い黄色い花で黄色の染料をクラフトできる
block.minecraft.suspicious_block.tip: Can be brushed to collect a buried item.
block.minecraft.sweet_berry_bush.tip: 食べられるスイートベリーが実るトゲのある低木
block.minecraft.tall_dry_grass.tip: Similar to grass, but found in the desert.
block.minecraft.tall_grass.tip: ダブルの高い草で時々種をドロップする
block.minecraft.target.tip: 矢で撃たれたときに信号を発します
block.minecraft.terracotta.tip: かまどで粘土を精錬するとできる
block.minecraft.tinted_glass.tip: A type of glass that does not let light through it.
block.minecraft.tnt.tip: 爆発を起こすのに使う。置いてから火打ち石と打ち金を使ったり、電気を通すことで起爆する
block.minecraft.torch.tip: 明かりを照らすのに使う。たいまつは、雪や氷も溶かすことができる
block.minecraft.torchflower.tip: Grows when Torchflower Seeds are planted. Can be used as decoration.
block.minecraft.trapdoor.tip: 使用したり、叩いたり、レッドストーンで開く。普通のドアとして機能するが、ブロック１個分であり、平らな床面として置ける
block.minecraft.trapped_chest.tip: ブロックやアイテムを中に保管する。2つのチェストを横に並べて置くと、容量が２倍の大きなチェストになる。トラップチェストは、開けるとレッドストーン信号を発生させる
block.minecraft.trial_spawner.tip: Spawns waves of monsters and gives items when they are all defeated.
block.minecraft.tripwire.tip: 何かが引っかかると、接続しているトリップワイヤーフックが始動する
block.minecraft.tripwire_hook.tip: 何かがトリップワイヤーに引っかかると作動する
block.minecraft.tuff.tip: Generated as part of Amethyst Geodes. Can be used as decoration.
block.minecraft.tuff_brick_wall.tip: A wall made of Tuff Bricks.
block.minecraft.tuff_bricks.tip: Made from Tuff blocks. Commonly found in Trial Chambers.
block.minecraft.turtle_egg.tip: ウミガメが砂のブロックの上に産む。少し時間がたつと夜間に孵化する。とても壊れやすい!
block.minecraft.twisting_vines.tip: A plant found in Warped Forests in the Nether. Grows upwards and can be climbed on.
block.minecraft.vault.tip: Unlocked with Trial Keys and can reward each player once.
block.minecraft.verdant_froglight.tip: Drops from small Magma Cubes when eaten by a Cold Frog.
block.minecraft.vine.tip: 置くと徐々に茂る。ハサミを使って集める。はしごのように登ることができる
block.minecraft.void_air.tip: Air generated deep in the world.
block.minecraft.warped_fungus.tip: Found in the Nether. Scares Hoglins away and can be used to breed Striders.
block.minecraft.warped_planks.tip: Used as a building material and can be crafted into many things. Can be crafted from Warped stems and hyphae.
block.minecraft.warped_pressure_plate.ti: 感度が高い歪んだ板で、どんな圧力でも作動する
block.minecraft.warped_roots.tip: Found in Warped Forests. Can be used as decoration.
block.minecraft.warped_wart_block.tip: Harvested from huge warped fungi in the Nether. Can be used as decoration.
block.minecraft.water.tip: 火を消し、作物の成長を助ける。バケツで採取できる

block.minecraft.weeping_vines.tip: A plant found in Crimson Forests in the Nether. Grows downwards and can be climbed on.
block.minecraft.wet_sponge.tip: かまどで乾かすと再度使える
block.minecraft.wheat.tip: 十分に育つと作物が実り、小麦を収穫できる
白のテラコッタをかまどで焼くことで作成できる装飾用ブロック
block.minecraft.white_tulip.tip: A small white flower that can be used to craft light gray dye.
block.minecraft.wildflowers.tip: Tiny white and yellow flowers that can be used to craft yellow dye.
block.minecraft.wither_rose.tip: A dangerous flower that grows from mobs killed by the Wither.
block.minecraft.wood.tip: 原木から作られる。木の板の材料になったい、燃料としても使われたり、斧で剝いだりできる
block.minecraft.wool.tip: 羊から採れる。染料を使って色を変えることができる
block.minecraft.yellow_glazed_terracotta: 黄色のテラコッタをかまどで焼くことで作成できる装飾用ブロック
entity.minecraft.allay.tip: Can be given an item, and will look for a dropped item of same type. Once it finds one, it will drop it to the player who gave it an item or its linked Note Block.
entity.minecraft.armadillo.tip: Rolls up to protect itself. Drops Armadillo Scutes randomly, or when brushed.
entity.minecraft.axolotl.tip: Generates in Lush Caves and can be caught in a bucket. Can breathe out of water for 5 minutes before having to return. Can be caught in a Bucket and will help fight against aquatic mobs.
entity.minecraft.bat.tip: 洞穴や閉ざされた広い空間に生息する空飛ぶ動物
entity.minecraft.bee.tip: Lives in Bee Nests and produces honey from a flower's nectar.
entity.minecraft.blaze.tip: 暗黒界に出現する敵。主に暗黒砦内にいる。倒すとブレイズ ロッドを落とす
entity.minecraft.bogged.tip: Fires poisonous arrows at you. Drops arrows of poison when killed.
entity.minecraft.breeze.tip: Found in Trial Chambers. Drops Breeze Rods when killed.
entity.minecraft.cat.tip: Found as strays in villages and witch huts. Can be tamed using Salmon or Cod.
entity.minecraft.chicken.tip: 倒すと羽根を落とす。タマゴを持っている場合もある
entity.minecraft.cod.tip: 群れで行動するおいしい魚
entity.minecraft.cow.tip: 倒すと革を落とす。バケツがあればミルクも取れる
entity.minecraft.creaking.tip: Spawned from Creaking Hearts, and attacks you if you look away from it. Break the Creaking Heart to destroy it!
entity.minecraft.creeper.tip: 近づきすぎると爆発する!
entity.minecraft.dolphin.tip: 泳いでいるプレイヤーを追いかけ、より早く泳げるように手助けする陽気な海の生物! イルカに魚を与えると助けてくれるかも
entity.minecraft.donkey.tip: 手なずけて乗ることができる。チェストを取りつけられる
entity.minecraft.drowned.tip: 水につかったゾンビ。トライデントを持っていることがある
entity.minecraft.elder_guardian.tip: 海の要塞にいる危険なモンスター。ガーディアンの最強版
entity.minecraft.ender_dragon.tip: 果ての世界に存在する大きな黒竜
entity.minecraft.enderman.tip: 照準を向けると攻撃してくる。ブロックを移動できる
entity.minecraft.endermite.tip: There is a small chance using an Ender pearl will spawn one. Will attack you if you are nearby.
entity.minecraft.evoker.tip: エヴォーカーは森林地帯の屋敷に生息。キバで攻撃し、ヴェックスを呼びます
entity.minecraft.fox.tip: Attacks small creatures and loves to eat.
entity.minecraft.frog.tip: Grows from Tadpoles and eats Magma Cubes.
entity.minecraft.ghast.tip: 当たると爆発する火の玉を放ってくる
entity.minecraft.glow_squid.tip: Glows in the dark and drops Glow Ink Sacs when killed.
entity.minecraft.goat.tip: Generates in the mountains. Can jump very high and randomly rams into entities.
entity.minecraft.guardian.tip: 海の要塞近くにいる危険なモンスター。レーザーに注意！
entity.minecraft.happy_ghast.tip: A friendly, mountable Ghast grown from a Dried Ghast. Loves snowballs too!
entity.minecraft.hoglin.tip: A hostile creature generated in the Nether. Drops porkchops on death and can be bred with Crimson Fungi!
entity.minecraft.horse.tip: 手なづけて乗ることができる
entity.minecraft.husk.tip: 日光で燃えないゾンビ。攻撃を受けるとお腹が減ってしまう！
entity.minecraft.illusioner.tip: A powerful Illager that casts spells. Is also armed with a bow.
entity.minecraft.iron_golem.tip: 村に出現して村人を守ってくれる。鉄のブロックとカボチャで作ることもできる
entity.minecraft.llama.tip: ラマは手なずけて乗ることができます。手綱を使ってラマに長いキャラバンを組ませると、アイテムを運ぶことができます
entity.minecraft.magma_cube.tip: 暗黒界に出現する。ダメージを受けると小さなマグマキューブに分裂する。
entity.minecraft.mooshroom.tip: おわんを使うと、きのこシチューが採れる。ハサミで毛刈りをするときのこを落とすが、普通の牛になってしまう
entity.minecraft.mule.tip: 馬とロバをかけ合わせて繁殖させると生まれる。手なずけると乗ったり、チェストの運搬が可能になる
entity.minecraft.ocelot.tip: ジャングルに生息。生の鮭とタラを与えて飼い慣らせる。ヤマネコは不意な動きに驚いてすぐに逃げるため、向こうから寄ってくるのを待たなければならない
entity.minecraft.panda.tip: A Jungle animal that can have six different personalities, and really loves Bamboo.
entity.minecraft.parrot.tip: オウムはカラフルな鳥でジャングルに生息します。肩に乗ったり、音を真似たりするのが好きですが、チョコレートクッキーが嫌いです
entity.minecraft.phantom.tip: 疲れたプレイヤーを狩る悪夢のモンスター
entity.minecraft.pig.tip: 倒すと豚肉を落とす。鞍があれば乗ることもできる
entity.minecraft.piglin.tip: Piglins are generated in the Nether and love Gold. Try bartering a Gold Ingot with them!
entity.minecraft.piglin_brute.tip: A powerful Piglin that does not get distracted by gold. Generated in Bastion Remnants.
entity.minecraft.pillager.tip: Hostile Mob that uses a Crossbow!
entity.minecraft.polar_bear.tip: 始めはおとなしいが、おとなになると自分か子供が攻撃を受けると襲い掛かってくる
entity.minecraft.pufferfish.tip: 恐怖を感じると膨らむ魚。触れたもの全てに毒を与える!
entity.minecraft.rabbit.tip: 害のない生き物。倒されるとウサギの革とウサギの足をドロップする
entity.minecraft.ravager.tip: Hostile mobs that appear during Village Raids. Blocking their attacks with a Shield can stun them!
entity.minecraft.salmon.tip: 冷たい海を好むおいしい魚。川を上ることができる
entity.minecraft.sheep.tip: 毛を刈るときウールを落とす (毛が残っている場合)。ウールはいろいろな色に染められる
entity.minecraft.shulker.tip: エンドシティにいる危険なモブ。殻に閉じこもり周囲のプルパーブロックに隠れている
entity.minecraft.silverfish.tip: 攻撃すると、近くに隠れているシルバーフィッシュも集まってくる。石ブロックの中に隠れている
entity.minecraft.skeleton.tip: 矢を放ってくる。倒すと矢を落とす
entity.minecraft.skeleton_horse.tip: 雷に当たったことで生成されたスケルトンの馬!
entity.minecraft.slime.tip: ダメージを与えると、小さなスライムに分裂する
entity.minecraft.snow_golem.tip: 雪ブロックとカボチャで作れるゴーレム。作った人の敵に向かって雪玉を投げつける
entity.minecraft.spider.tip: 近づくと攻撃してくる。壁を登ることができる。倒すと糸を落とす
entity.minecraft.squid.tip: 倒すとイカスミを落とす
entity.minecraft.stray.tip: チップ付きの矢で武装。30秒間、鈍化の影響を与える
entity.minecraft.strider.tip: Generates on lava oceans in The Nether. Can be ridden with a Saddle and controlled using a Warped Fungus in a Stick.
entity.minecraft.tadpole.tip: Tadpoles are generated from Frogspawn laid by Frogs. Will turn into a Frog after some time, with its color depending on the biome it grows in.
entity.minecraft.tropical_fish.tip: 暖かい海を好むカラフルな魚
entity.minecraft.turtle.tip: 必ず生息地に戻って卵を産む両生類のモブ。子供のウミガメは成長する際に鱗を落とす
entity.minecraft.vex.tip: ヴェックスはエヴォーカーが呼び出す幽霊のような存在。飛ぶことができ、ダメージを受けるずにどんなブロックも通過します
entity.minecraft.villager.tip: 村にいる。職業に応じて、プレイヤーに売るアイテムを提示する
entity.minecraft.vindicator.tip: ヴィンディケーターは攻撃的で、斧で武装しています
entity.minecraft.wandering_trader.tip: A special trader who roams the world collecting and selling rare and exotic items.
entity.minecraft.warden.tip: Extremely powerful, spawning when Sculk Catalysts are triggered. Cannot see anything; can only locate entities via sound.
entity.minecraft.witch.tip: 沼に出現する敵。ポーションを投げて攻撃する。倒すとポーションを落とす
entity.minecraft.wither.tip: Can be creating using Wither Skulls and Soul Sand. Fires exploding skulls at you.
entity.minecraft.wolf.tip: 普段はおとなしいが、攻撃すると反撃してくる。骨を使うと手なずけることができ、プレイヤーについて回って、プレイヤーを攻撃してくる敵を攻撃してくれる
entity.minecraft.zoglin.tip: Created when a Hoglin zombifies in the Overworld. Attacks any mobs in sight.
entity.minecraft.zombie.tip: 近づくと攻撃してくる
entity.minecraft.zombie_horse.tip: 不死の馬。手なずけられない!
entity.minecraft.zombie_villager.tip: A Villager that has been zombified! Is there a cure?
entity.minecraft.zombified_piglin.tip: 最初はおとなしいが、1 匹を攻撃すると集団で反撃してくる
gamerule.legacy.default_map_size.descrip: The size of maps created from empty non-starter maps.
gamerule.legacy.default_show_armor_stand: When enabled, the armor stand will show arms when placed.
gamerule.legacy.falling_block_limit.desc: How many falling blocks can be active in the local area at the same time. 0 disables the limit.
gamerule.legacy.global_map_player_icon.d: Allow player icons to be visible on all created maps.
gamerule.legacy.legacy_flight.descriptio: When enabled, players will be able to fly in any direction and go up and down while fall flying in a Elytra.
gamerule.legacy.legacy_map_grid.descript: When enabled, the maps will be centered on X:0 and Y:0.
gamerule.legacy.legacy_mobcap_limits.des: When enabled, Legacy Console Edition mobcap limits are enforced for spawning, breeding and placement.
gamerule.legacy.legacy_offhand_limits.de: When enabled, Legacy Console Edition offhand limits are enforced.
gamerule.legacy.legacy_shield_controls.d: When enabled, shields automatically block while players are crouching or riding.
gamerule.legacy.legacy_swimming.descript: When enabled, players will be able to swim at any time they are in the water.
gamerule.legacy.player_starting_bundle.d: When enabled, the players will start with an empty bundle.
gamerule.legacy.player_starting_map.desc: When enabled, the players will start with an empty map.
gamerule.legacy.tnt_limit.description: How many TNTs can be active at the same time.
item.minecraft.amethyst_shard.tip: Acquired by mining Budding Amethyst. Can be used to make Tinted Glass and a Spyglass.
item.minecraft.apple.tip: Restores 2 §f🍖§r, and can be crafted into a golden apple.
item.minecraft.armadillo_scute.tip: Occasionally dropped by Armadillos, and can be used to craft Wolf Armor.
item.minecraft.armor_stand.tip: 防具をはじめモブの頭などの装飾品を飾れる
item.minecraft.armor_trim_smithing_templ: Can be trimmed onto an armor piece in a Smithing Table.
item.minecraft.arrow.tip: 弓と組み合わせて、武器として使う
item.minecraft.axe.tip: 木でできているブロックを切り出すのに使う。手で切り出すより速い
item.minecraft.axolotl_bucket.tip: Used to hold and transport axolotl.
item.minecraft.baked_potato.tip: Restores 2.5 §f🍖§r. Created by cooking a potato in a furnace.
item.minecraft.banner_pattern.tip: Can be used to customise Banners.
item.minecraft.beef.tip: Restores 1.5 §f🍖§r, or can be cooked in a furnace.
item.minecraft.beetroot.tip: Restores 0.5 §f🍖§r when eaten. Can also be crafted into Rose Red dye, or Beetroot Soup.
item.minecraft.beetroot_seeds.tip: 農地に植えるとビートルートが生える
item.minecraft.black_dye.tip: 黒のウールを作るのに使う染料
item.minecraft.blaze_powder.tip: ポーションの調合や、他のアイテムと合わせてエンダーアイまたはマグマクリームを作るのに使う
item.minecraft.blaze_rod.tip: ポーションの調合や要塞を探すのに使う。暗黒砦の周囲にいるブレイズが落とす
item.minecraft.blue_dye.tip: Used as a dye to create Blue Wool.
item.minecraft.blue_egg.tip: ニワトリがランダムで落とす。食べ物アイテムの材料になる
item.minecraft.boat.tip: 泳ぐよりも速く水中を移動するのに使う。
item.minecraft.bone.tip: ガイコツを倒すと手に入る。骨粉の材料となる。またはオオカミに与えると手なずけることができる
item.minecraft.bone_meal.tip: Used to instantly grow crops, trees, tall grass, huge mushrooms and flowers; and as a dye to create White Wool.
item.minecraft.book.tip: 本棚を作るのに使う。エンチャントするとエンチャントの本になる。
item.minecraft.bow.tip: 矢を射る攻撃ができる
item.minecraft.bowl.tip: きのこシチューとビートルートスープを入れるのに使う。シチューを食べてしまっても、おわんは残る
item.minecraft.breeze_rod.tip: Used to craft a Mace. Dropped by Breezes in Trial Chambers.
item.minecraft.brick.tip: かまどで粘土を焼いて作る
item.minecraft.brown_dye.tip: Used as a dye to create Brown Wool.
item.minecraft.brown_egg.tip: ニワトリがランダムで落とす。食べ物アイテムの材料になる
item.minecraft.brush.tip: Can be used to brush suspicious sand or gravel.
item.minecraft.bucket.tip: Used to hold and transport water, lava and milk.
item.minecraft.bundle.tip: Can store multiple different items up to a stack.
item.minecraft.carrot.tip: Restores 1.5 §f🍖§r, and can be crafted into a golden carrot. Can be planted in farmland.
item.minecraft.carrot_on_a_stick.tip: 鞍をつけた豚に乗って、操縦するのに使われる
item.minecraft.cauldron.tip: 染料を混ぜたり防具を染めたり、またはポーションを保管してチップ付きの矢を作るのに使われる。雨水またはバケツの水を入れる
item.minecraft.chest_boat.tip: アイテムを水上で移動するのに使う
item.minecraft.chest_minecart.tip: 物を載せて、レール上を移動できる
item.minecraft.chicken.tip: Restores 1 §f🍖§r, or can be cooked in a furnace. Eating this can cause you to be poisoned.
item.minecraft.chorus_fruit.tip: Eating restores 2 $1§f🍖§r, and may teleport the player. Can be cooked in a Furnace.
item.minecraft.clay_ball.tip: かまどで焼くとレンガになる
item.minecraft.clock.tip: 太陽と月の位置を表示する
item.minecraft.coal.tip: かまどの燃料として使用する。たいまつの材料にもなる
item.minecraft.cocoa_beans.tip: 茶色のウールを作るのに使う染料。クッキーの材料や、カカオの実を育てるのにも使われる
item.minecraft.cod.tip: Restores 1 §f🍖§r, or can be cooked in a furnace. Can be fed to an ocelot to tame it.
item.minecraft.cod_bucket.tip: タラを入れて運ぶのに使う
item.minecraft.command_block_minecart.ti: 移動中でのコマンドの実行に使う
item.minecraft.compass.tip: 自分のスタート地点を示す
item.minecraft.cooked_beef.tip: Restores 4 §f🍖§r. Created by cooking raw beef in a furnace.
item.minecraft.cooked_chicken.tip: Restores 3 §f🍖§r. Created by cooking raw chicken in a furnace.
item.minecraft.cooked_cod.tip: Restores 2.5 §f🍖§r. Created by cooking a raw Cod in a furnace.
item.minecraft.cooked_mutton.tip: Restores 3 §f🍖§r. Created by cooking raw mutton in a furnace.
item.minecraft.cooked_porkchop.tip: Restores 4 §f🍖§r. Created by cooking a raw porkchop in a furnace.
item.minecraft.cooked_rabbit.tip: Restores 2.5 §f🍖§r. Used to cook up some rabbit stew.
item.minecraft.cooked_salmon.tip: Restores 3 §f🍖§r. Created by cooking a raw salmon in a furnace.
item.minecraft.copper_horse_armor.tip: A special type of Armor that can be equipped to a horse. Provides 2 §f👘§r.
item.minecraft.copper_ingot.tip: A shiny ingot which can be used to craft a lightning rod, copper blocks or a spyglass. Created by smelting ore in a furnace.
item.minecraft.copper_nugget.tip: Created by smelting Copper armour and tools in a Furnace. Can be crafted into a Copper Ingot.
item.minecraft.copper_nautilus_armor.tip: A special type of Armor that can be equipped to a nautilus. Provides 2 §f👘§r.
item.minecraft.copper_spear.tip: A powerful weapon that can be used to jab enemies, similar to Swords but with farther reach, or charge at enemies with higher damage at higher velocity.
item.minecraft.crossbow.tip: A powerful alternative to the bow that can use arrows or fireworks.
item.minecraft.cyan_dye.tip: Used as a dye to create Cyan Wool.
item.minecraft.debug_stick.tip: Allows operators to modify block states.
item.minecraft.diamond.tip: Use these to create very strong tools, weapons or armor.
item.minecraft.diamond_horse_armor.tip: A special type of Armor that can be equipped to a horse. Provides 5.5 §f👘§r.
item.minecraft.diamond_nautilus_armor.ti: A special type of Armor that can be equipped to a nautilus. Provides 5.5 §f👘§r.
item.minecraft.diamond_spear.tip: A powerful weapon that can be used to jab enemies, similar to Swords but with farther reach, or charge at enemies with higher damage at higher velocity.
item.minecraft.disc_fragment_5.tip: Can be used to craft a Music Disc.
item.minecraft.dragon_breath.tip: Used in potion brewing. Obtained by capturing the Ender Dragon's acid breath in a Glass Bottle.
item.minecraft.dried_kelp.tip: Restores 0.5 §f🍖§r. Can be eaten more quickly than most other foods.
item.minecraft.echo_shard.tip: Found in Ancient Cities. Used to craft Recovery Compasses.
item.minecraft.egg.tip: ニワトリがランダムで落とす。食べ物アイテムの材料になる
item.minecraft.elytra.tip: Allows the player to glide when worn.
item.minecraft.enchanted_book.tip: Used with an Anvil to enchant weapons, tools or armor.
item.minecraft.enchanted_golden_apple.ti: Restores 2 §f🍖§r, regenerates health for 30 seconds, and grants fire resistance and damage resistance for 5 minutes. Crafted from an apple and gold blocks.
item.minecraft.end_crystal.tip: Heals the Ender Dragon, and can be used to respawn it. Explodes when attacked.
item.minecraft.ender_eye.tip: When thrown, will show the direction to an End Portal. When twelve of these are placed in the End Portal Frames, the End Portal will be activated.
item.minecraft.ender_pearl.tip: Dropped by Endermen when they die. Throwing an Ender Pearl will teleport the player to wherever it lands, at the cost of some health.
item.minecraft.experience_bottle.tip: When thrown, it drops Experience Orbs which increase your experience points when collected.
item.minecraft.feather.tip: Collected by killing a chicken. Can be crafted into an arrow.
item.minecraft.fermented_spider_eye.tip: Used in potion brewing; mainly to create potions with a negative effect.
item.minecraft.filled_map.tip: 手に持っていると、探索済みのエリアの地図を表示する。道を確認するのに使う
item.minecraft.fire_charge.tip: 火をつけるのに便利。分配装置から撃ち出して、無差別に火を起こすのにも使われる
item.minecraft.firework_rocket.tip: 起動すると、色鮮やかな爆発を起こす。色、効果、形、変化は、花火を作る時に使う花火の星によって決まる
item.minecraft.firework_star.tip: 花火の色、効果、形を決めるのに使う
item.minecraft.flint.tip: Collected by digging gravel. Can be used to craft a flint and steel.
item.minecraft.flint_and_steel.tip: 火を起こしたり、TNT とクリーパーを起爆したり、建築済みの闇のポータルを開くのに使う
block.minecraft.flower_pot.tip: Used as a decoration. Flowers, Saplings, Cacti and Mushrooms can be planted in it.
item.minecraft.furnace_minecart.tip: レールの上を移動する。石炭を使うことで他のトロッコを押すことができる
item.minecraft.ghast_tear.tip: ポーションの調合に使う。ガストが倒されたときに落とす
item.minecraft.glass_bottle.tip: 水を入れるビン。調合台でポーションを作る時、最初に必要になる
item.minecraft.glow_berries.tip: Restores 0.5 §f🍖§r. Can also be planted under blocks to grow Cave Vines.
item.minecraft.glow_ink_sac.tip: Dropped by Glow Squids on death. Can be used to craft Glow Item Frames or to make text in Signs glow.
item.minecraft.glow_item_frame.tip: An Item Frame that glows in the dark.
item.minecraft.glowstone_dust.tip: 光石を掘ると手に入る。光石のブロックに戻すことができる。ポーションに加えて調合すると、効果のレベルが上がる
item.minecraft.goat_horn.tip: Dropped when Goats ram into a block. Plays a loud noise on use.
item.minecraft.gold_nugget.tip: ゾンビ ピッグマンが倒されたときに落とす。ゾンビピッグマンは暗黒界にいる。ポーションを調合する際の原材料として使われる
item.minecraft.golden_apple.tip: Restores 2 §f🍖§r, and regenerates health for 4 seconds. Crafted from an Apple and Gold Ingots.
item.minecraft.golden_carrot.tip: Restores 3 §f🍖§r. Crafted from a carrot and gold nuggets.
item.minecraft.golden_horse_armor.tip: A special type of Armor that can be equipped to a horse. Provides 3.5 §f👘§r.
item.minecraft.golden_nautilus_armor.tip: A special type of Armor that can be equipped to a nautilus. Provides 3.5 §f👘§r.
item.minecraft.golden_spear.tip: A powerful weapon that can be used to jab enemies, similar to Swords but with farther reach, or charge at enemies with higher damage at higher velocity.
item.minecraft.gray_dye.tip: 灰色のウールを作るのに使う染料
item.minecraft.green_dye.tip: 緑のウールを作るのに使う染料
item.minecraft.gunpowder.tip: クリーパーを倒すと手に入る。TNTの材料となる。ポーションを調合する際の原材料としても使われる
item.minecraft.harness.tip: Used to attract and ride a Happy Ghast.
item.minecraft.heart_of_the_sea.tip: 埋蔵された宝のチェストから手に入る。コンジットの材料になる
item.minecraft.hoe.tip: 土や草のブロックを耕して作物を育てられるようにする
item.minecraft.honey_bottle.tip: Restores 3 §f🍖§r and cures poison. Can be used to craft Honey Blocks.
item.minecraft.honeycomb.tip: Harvested from bee nests with shears. Can be used to craft Candles and Honeycomb Blocks.
item.minecraft.hopper_minecart.tip: ホッパーに似た働きをする特殊なトロッコ。レールの上や上部にある入れ物からアイテムを集める
item.minecraft.ingot.tip: 光沢を放つ延べ棒。道具を作る材料として使う。かまどで鉱石を精錬して作る
item.minecraft.ink_sac.tip: 黒のウールを作るのに使う染料
item.minecraft.iron_horse_armor.tip: A special type of Armor that can be equipped to a horse. Provides 2.5 §f👘§r.
item.minecraft.iron_nautilus_armor.tip: A special type of Armor that can be equipped to a nautilus. Provides 2.5 §f👘§r.

item.minecraft.iron_spear.tip: A powerful weapon that can be used to jab enemies, similar to Swords but with farther reach, or charge at enemies with higher damage at higher velocity.
item.minecraft.item_frame.tip: 陳列ケースと同じように、中に入れたアイテムまたはブロックを展示する
item.minecraft.knowledge_book.tip: Using this unlocks new crafting recipes.
item.minecraft.lapis_lazuli.tip: Used in enchanting and as a dye to create Blue Wool.
item.minecraft.lava_bucket.tip: 溶岩を入れて運ぶのに使う
item.minecraft.lead.tip: 生き物をプレイヤーや柵に繋ぐのに使う
item.minecraft.leather.tip: 牛を倒すと手に入る。防具の材料となる。本を作る際にも使われる
item.minecraft.leather_horse_armor.tip: A special type of Armor that can be dyed and equipped to a horse. Provides 1.5 §f👘§r.
item.minecraft.light_blue_dye.tip: 空色のウールを作るのに使う染料
item.minecraft.light_gray_dye.tip: Used as a dye to create Light Gray Wool. (Note: Light Gray Dye can also be made by combining Gray Dye with Bone Meal, letting you make four Light Gray Dyes instead of three.)
item.minecraft.lime_dye.tip: Used as a dye to create Lime Wool.

legacy.menu.how_to_play.anvil_message:
§2HOW TO PLAY : ANVIL§f

Experience Levels can be used to repair, enchant or rename items with the Anvil.
All items can be renamed, although only items with durability can be repaired or have enchantments from Enchanted Books applied to them.
legacy.menu.how_to_play.anvil_message_1:
An item can be repaired by placing it in one of the input slots on the left, along with either some raw materials of the item, like Iron Ingots for an Iron Sword, or combined with another item of the same type.
Combining items is more efficient when done with an Anvil, and additionally, if either of the items were enchanted, the finished product may have enchantments from either of the inputs. Enchanted Books can apply enchantments to items by combining them at an Anvil if the Book's enchantment is suitable. Enchanted Books can be found in Chests within dungeons, or enchanted from normal Books at the Enchantment Table. There is a chance that the Anvil will be damaged with each use and after enough punishment, it will be destroyed.
legacy.menu.how_to_play.banner_message:
§2HOW TO PLAY : BANNERS§f

Banners are highly customizable decorations that can be placed either free-standing or attached to other blocks. To get started with banner crafting, open up a Loom.

You'll need some wool and a stick to craft the base of your banner; try using dyed wool for a more colorful base. Press %s to start adding patterns.

When you have placed your base, you can add up to 6 patterns to your banner to make it unique. The last pattern you select will always be on top, so make sure to add your backgrounds first. Remember that nothing is permanent until you press %s to create, so don't be afraid to experiment!
legacy.menu.how_to_play.banner_message_1:
There are loads of patterns to play with, split into five different groups that you can navigate by pressing %s and %s.
Every pattern can be added in different colors using dyes, and some patterns require other items too.
Add a pattern by pressing %s, and when you're done press %s to add the completed Banner to your inventory!

You can also copy a completed banner to a blank banner of the same base color, so don't worry about memorizing how you made your favorites.
legacy.menu.how_to_play.basics_message:
§2HOW TO PLAY : BASICS§f

Minecraft is a game about placing blocks to build anything you can imagine, at night monsters come out, so make sure to build a shelter before that happens.

Use %s to look around

Use %s to move around

Press %s to jump
legacy.menu.how_to_play.basics_message_1:
Push %s forward twice in rapid succession to sprint. while you hold %s forward,
you will continue to sprint until you run out of sprint time or have less than §f🍖 🍖 🍖§f.

Hold %s to mine and chop using your hand or whatever you are holding. you may need to craft a tool to mine some blocks.

If you are holding an item in your hand, use %s to use that item or press %s to drop it.
legacy.menu.how_to_play.beacon_message:
§2HOW TO PLAY : BEACONS§f

Active Beacons project a bright beam of light into the sky and grant powers to nearby players. They are crafted with Glass, Obsidian, and Nether Stars (which can be obtained by defeating the Wither).
legacy.menu.how_to_play.beacon_message_1:
Beacons must be placed so that they are in sunlight during the day. Beacons must be placed on Pyramids of Iron, Gold, Emerald, or Diamond.
The material that the Beacon is placed on has no effect on the power of the Beacon.
In the Beacon menu, you can select one primary power for your Beacon. The more tiers your pyramid has, the more powers you will be able to choose from. A Beacon on a pyramid with at least four tiers also gives the option of either the Regeneration secondary power or a stronger primary power.

To set the powers of your Beacon, you must sacrifice an Emerald, Diamond, Gold Ingot, or Iron Ingot in the payment slot. Once set, the powers will emanate from the Beacon indefinitely.
legacy.menu.how_to_play.breeding-animals:
§2HOW TO PLAY : BREEDING ANIMALS§f

The animals in Minecraft can breed, and will produce baby versions of themselves!
To get animals to breed, you will need to feed them with the right food to get them to go into 'Love Mode'.
Feed Wheat to a cow, mooshroom, or sheep; Carrots or Beetroot to a pig; any kind of Seeds to a chicken; Carrots, Golden Carrots, or Dandelions to a rabbit; uncooked fish of any kind to an ocelot; or any kind of meat to a wolf; and they'll start looking for another nearby animal of the same species that is also in Love Mode.

When two animals of the same species meet, and both are in Love Mode, they will kiss for a few seconds, and then a baby animal will appear. The baby animal will follow its parents for a while before growing into a full-sized animal itself.
After breeding, an animal won't be able to enter Love Mode again for about five minutes.
There is a limit to the number of animals it is possible to have in a world, so you may find that animals don't breed when you have a lot of them.
